title: TCI Express is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: TCI Express is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the TCI Express family as a Warehouse Manager in Allahabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TCI Express:
TCI Express is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TCI Express!
